message:
test(promise): 39 unit tests for Promise/Future and spawn infrastructure (wa-2na51)

24 tests for lib.rs: BrokenPromise display, Promise construction,
ok/err/result resolution, Future immediate-ready constructors,
polling behavior (pending→ready), waker integration, cross-thread
resolution, type flexibility (Vec, unit), multiple futures.

15 tests for spawn.rs: block_on with various types, ScopedExecutor
lifecycle/default/spawn, SimpleExecutor scheduler configuration,
spawn_into_new_thread success/error/computation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
